texto: It is not enough to protect the source of the light
autor: the paths of the light must be protected as well so that either we may reach the light or the light may reach us!
explicacao: Citação de the paths of the light must be protected as well so that either we may reach the light or the light may reach us! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is not enough to protect the source of the light” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, enough em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
